name: Maverick Force X Spot

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: B507B18B-0CB6-4F4E-8C2A-734116B878C9

comment: This fast lightweight powerhouse combines the latest Maverick series technical advancements to achieve 17,325 lumens of output in a design that maintains a flat field of focus all the way from its narrow 3.5° beam to a broad 57.7° spot. Color calibration and gobo selection comes matched to other Force fixtures in the rig and its wheelhouse includes a variable CMY color mixing system renowned for its real reds, color wheel with CRI and CTB filters, static and rotating gobo wheels, five-facet prism, iris, and frost. With superb dimming performance, an expansive 18:1 zoom, and a full armory of features, Maverick Force X Spot is a compact LED moving spot ready for a wide range of short and long throw applications. Take control with DMX, RDM, sACN, Art-Net, or W-DMX.

capabilities.comment: Slow Open Fast Close  S > F
Slow Close Fast Open  S > F

With superb dimming performance, an expansive 18:1 zoom, and a full armory of features, Maverick Force X Spot is a compact LED moving spot ready for a wide range of short and long throw applications.
